mapper.select: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml selectTemperingCodeMappList */ SELECT OWCDDTKEY , OWCDDTVALUE FROM TADMIN_MST_OWCD_DT WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OWCDHDKEY='10006' AND LAKEY = 'KOR'
/* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml selectOperstatypeMappList */ SELECT OWCDDTKEY , OWCDDTVALUE FROM TADMIN_MST_OWCD_DT WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OWCDHDKEY='10011' AND LAKEY = 'KOR'
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcunit */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICUT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUTKEY /*상품 단위 코드*/ , #{closdate} AS CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT T.OWKEY , T.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUTKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM ( SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , I.ICKEY FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY I.ICKEY ) T LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUT IU ON T.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND T.ICKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY ) TT WHERE SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIctxtype */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE M SET ( ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , IFLENGTH /*길이*/ , IFWIDTH /*너비*/ , IFHEIGHT /*높이*/ , IFSIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , IFWEIGHT /*중량(인터페이스)*/ , IFWEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위(인터페이스)*/ , IFVOL /*부피(인터페이스)*/ , IFVOLUNIT /*부피단위(인터페이스)*/ , NUMERATOR /*분자(인터페이스)*/ , DENOMINATOR /*분모(인터페이스)*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) = ( SELECT IU.COVERTQTY AS ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , COALESCE(IU.LENGTH, 0) AS LENGTH /*길이*/ , COALESCE(IU.WIDTH, 0) AS WIDTH /*너비*/ , COALESCE(IU.HEIGHT, 0) AS HEIGHT /*높이*/ , IU.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , COALESCE(IU.WEIGHT, 0) AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , IU.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , COALESCE(IU.VOLUME, 0) AS VOLUME /*부피*/ , IU.VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , IU.LENGTH AS INTF_LENGTH /*길이*/ , IU.WIDTH AS INTF_WIDTH /*너비*/ , IU.HEIGHT AS INTF_HEIGHT /*높이*/ , IU.SIZEUNIT AS INTF_SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , IU.INTF_WEIGHT /*중량(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_VOLUME /*부피(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위(인터페이스)*/ , IU.NUMERATOR /*분자(인터페이스)*/ , IU.DENOMINATOR /*분모(인터페이스)*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.COVERTQTY > 0 AND IU.ICKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = M.ICUNITTYPE AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.COVERTQTY > 0 AND IU.ICKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = M.ICUNITTYPE AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} )
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIctxtype */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , ICUNITTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , ICUNITQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , VOLUNIT /*부피단위*/ , IFICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형(인터페이스)*/ , IFWEIGHT /*중량(인터페이스)*/ , IFWEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위(인터페이스)*/ , IFVOL /*부피(인터페이스)*/ , IFVOLUNIT /*부피단위(인터페이스)*/ , NUMERATOR /*분자(인터페이스)*/ , DENOMINATOR /*분모(인터페이스)*/ , MEASUREMENTYN /*실측여부*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUTKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , TT.ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , TT.ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , TT.ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , TT.LENGTH /*길이*/ , TT.WIDTH /*너비*/ , TT.HEIGHT /*높이*/ , TT.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , TT.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TT.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , TT.VOLUME /*부피*/ , TT.VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , TT.INTF_ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_WEIGHT /*중량(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_VOLUME /*부피(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위(인터페이스)*/ , TT.NUMERATOR /*분자(인터페이스)*/ , TT.DENOMINATOR /*분모(인터페이스)*/ , 'N' , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT IU.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY /*상품코드(상품단위코드)*/ , IU.UOM AS ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형*/ , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY IU.ICKEY ORDER BY IU.COVERTQTY DESC, CASE IU.UOM WHEN #{eauom} THEN 9999 ELSE 1 END ) AS ICUTORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , IU.COVERTQTY AS ICUTQTY /*상품단위수량*/ , COALESCE(IU.LENGTH, 0) AS LENGTH /*길이*/ , COALESCE(IU.WIDTH, 0) AS WIDTH /*너비*/ , COALESCE(IU.HEIGHT, 0) AS HEIGHT /*높이*/ , IU.SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , COALESCE(IU.WEIGHT, 0) AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , IU.WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , COALESCE(IU.VOLUME, 0) AS VOLUME /*부피*/ , IU.VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , IU.INTF_UOM AS INTF_ICUTTYPE /*상품단위유형(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_WEIGHT /*중량(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_VOLUME /*부피(인터페이스)*/ , IU.INTF_VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위(인터페이스)*/ , IU.NUMERATOR /*분자(인터페이스)*/ , IU.DENOMINATOR /*분모(인터페이스)*/ , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE M ON IU.ICKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = M.ICUNITTYPE AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.COVERTQTY > 0 ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIctxtypeOrder */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE M SET ( ICUNITORDER /*상품단위순서*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) = ( SELECT T.ICUTORDER , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT U.OWKEY , U.ICUNITKEY , U.ICUNITTYPE , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY U.ICUNITKEY ORDER BY U.ICUNITQTY DESC , CASE U.ICUNITTYPE WHEN #{boxuom} THEN 1 WHEN #{eauom} THEN 9999 ELSE 2 END ) AS ICUTORDER FROM TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE U WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT I WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND U.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND I.ICKEY = U.ICUNITKEY ) ) T WHERE T.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND T.ICUTKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND T.ICUTTYPE = M.ICUNITTYPE ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.ICKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND M.OWKEY = #{owkey} )
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIctxtypexct */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT TT.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , TT.ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , TT.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT B.OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , B.ICUNITKEY /*물품 단위 코드*/ , B.ICUNITTYPE /*물품 단위 유형*/ , CT.CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , CASE WHEN M.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE B ON IU.ICKEY = B.ICUNITKEY AND IU.UOM = B.ICUNITTYPE AND B.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON B.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGRXCT CT ON IC.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND IC.ICGRPKEY = CT.ICGRPKEY AND CT.ICGRPTYPE = 'CATEGORY' LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPEXCT M ON B.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND B.ICUNITKEY = M.ICUNITKEY AND B.ICUNITTYPE = M.ICUNITTYPE AND CT.CTKEY = M.CTKEY WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'

/* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcbacode */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICBACODE ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , BARCODE /*바코드*/ , UOM /*단위*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY , T.ICKEY , T.BARCODE , T.UOM , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT IU.ICKEY , IU.BARCODE , IU.UOM , CASE WHEN B.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT IU LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICBACODE B ON B.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IU.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND IU.UOM = B.UOM AND IU.BARCODE = B.BARCODE WHERE IU.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IU.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IU.BARCODE IS NOT NULL ) T WHERE T.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update:
/* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateItems */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_IC UIC SET ( UIC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , UIC.ICGRPKEY /*상품그룹*/ , UIC.ICGRPTYPE /*상품그룹유형*/ , UIC.ICUNITKEY /*상품단위코드*/ , UIC.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , UIC.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , UIC.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , UIC.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , UIC.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , UIC.VOL /*부피*/ , UIC.EXPCKYN /*유통기한체크여부(신물류관리)*/ , UIC.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , UIC.UDF2 /*온도구분(물류그룹 1 : 상온 , 2: 냉장 , 3: 냉동 , 4 : 초저온)*/ , UIC.IFTEMPERING , UIC.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , UIC.SPEC /*규격*/ , UIC.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , UIC.UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , UIC.UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , UIC.OPERSTATUSTYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , UIC.IFOPERSTATYPE , UIC.SHELFDAY /*유통기한*/ , UIC.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , UIC.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , UIC.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , UIC.WEIGHTPI /*단품중량*/ , UIC.VOLPI /*단품부피*/ , UIC.WGTCFYN /*검근여부*/ , UIC.IFYN /*인터페이스유무(인터페이스받은 데이터)*/ , UIC.BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , UIC.BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , UIC.BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , UIC.BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , UIC.BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ , UIC.IFUOM /*단위(인터페이스)*/ , UIC.IFCOST /*소비기한(인터페이스)*/ , UIC.IFICTYPE ) = ( SELECT IIC.ICNAME /*상품명*/ , CTG.ICGRPKEY /*상품그룹 : 대중소 최상위*/ , 'CATEGORY' AS ICGRTYPE /*상품그룹유형*/ , IIC.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY /*상품단위코드*/ , IIC.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , STND.BOXWIDTH AS WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , STND.BOXLENGTH AS LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , STND.BOXHEIGHT AS HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , STND.BOXWEIGHT AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , STND.BOXVOLUME AS VOLUME /*부피*/ , CASE WHEN COALESCE(IIC.COST, 0)=0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부(신물류관리)*/ , IIC.COST AS SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , IIC.TEMPERING AS UDF2 /*온도구분(물류그룹 1 : 상온 , 2: 냉장 , 3: 냉동 , 4 : 초저온)*/ , IIC.INTF_TEMPERING , IIC.IC_TYPE AS ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , IIC.SPEC /*규격*/ , IIC.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , IIC.IC_STATUS AS OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , IIC.INTF_IC_STATUS AS INTF_OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , IIC.COST AS SHELFDAY /*유통기한*/ , STND.EAWIDTH AS WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , STND.EALENGTH AS LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , STND.EAHEIGHT AS HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , STND.EAWEIGHT AS WEIGHTPI /*단품중량*/ , STND.EAVOLUME AS VOLUMEPI /*단품부피*/ , IIC.WGT_CF_YN /*검근여부*/ , 'Y' AS IFYN /*인터페이스유무(인터페이스받은 데이터)*/ , STND.BOLWIDTH AS BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , STND.BOLLENGTH AS BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , STND.BOLHEIGHT AS BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , STND.BOLWEIGHT AS BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , STND.BOLVOLUME AS BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ , IIC.INTF_UOM /*단위(인터페이스)*/ , IIC.INTF_COST /*소비기한(인터페이스)*/ , IIC.INTF_IC_TYPE FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC IIC JOIN (
) STND ON IIC.ICKEY = STND.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CTG CTG ON IIC.CTGKEY = CTG.CTGKEY AND CTG.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE UIC.ICKEY = IIC.ICKEY AND UIC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IIC.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IIC.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) WHERE UIC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC UIIC WHERE UIIC.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND UIIC.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND UIIC.ICKEY = UIC.ICKEY )
mapper.insert:
/* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertItems */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_IC ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , ICNM /*상품명*/ , ICGRPKEY /*상품그룹*/ , ICGRPTYPE /*상품그룹유형*/ , ICUNITKEY /*상품단위코드*/ , UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , VOL /*부피*/ , EXPCKYN /*유통기한체크여부(신물류관리)*/ , SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , EXPCKTYPE /*유통 기한구분(유형)*/ , UDF1 /*사용자정의필드1*/ , UDF2 /*온도구분(물류그룹 1 : 상온 , 2: 냉장 , 3: 냉동 , 4 : 초저온)*/ , IFTEMPERING , UDF3 /*사용자정의필드3*/ , UDF4 /*사용자정의필드4*/ , UDF5 /*사용자정의필드5*/ , SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼입력유형*/ , ACKEY /*대표거래처코드*/ , REGDATE /*반영일자*/ , TAXYN /*과세구분(Y/0:과세,N/1:면세)*/ , DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , ORDSTOPDATE /*변경시작일*/ , OBDAYS /*출고기준일수*/ , LONONSTOCKTYPE /*물류무재고운영구분*/ , DISPSHELFKEY /*집기코드대분류(상온)*/ , STGNIVTYPE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , STGNIVDATE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , MINORDQTY /*발주배수하한*/ , MAXORDQTY /*발주배수상한*/ , BRANDCD /*브랜드코드*/ , SPEC /*규격*/ , CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입(첫발주)일자*/ , FOODYN /*식품여부(Y:식품,N:비식품)*/ , CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , STCAPPLYGRADECD /*재고등급코드(OMS)*/ , ACCEXDAY /*체화예정소진일수*/ , OPERSTATUSTYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , IFOPERSTATYPE , BOXYN /*공박스유무*/ , BTLYN /*공병유무*/ , BOXICKEY /*공박스상품코드*/ , BTLICKEY /*공병상품코드*/ , SHELFDAY /*유통기한*/ , WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , WEIGHTPI /*단품중량*/ , VOLUMEPI /*단품부피*/ , ORDQTY /*점포발주입수*/ , STDCP /*표준원가*/ , SCMCK /*SCM팀확인*/ , SCMURKEY /*SCM팀확인자*/ , STCAPPLYGRADETYPE /*재고등급구분(OMS)*/ , MDTEAL /*MD팀*/ , MDNAME /*MD명*/ , STCAPPLYGRADENM /*재고등급명(OMS)*/ , IMGURL /*상품 이미지 URL*/ , OPTKEY /**/ , OPTNM /**/ , QCTYPE /**/ , NOPACKAGE /**/ , CNTRYCD /**/ , ACCEXDAYFLAG /**/ , UDF6 /**/ , PLTQTY /*팔렛 입수 수량*/ , BRANDKEY /**/ , WGTCFYN /*검근여부*/ , WGTTYPE /*정산중량기준(A:상품중량, B:입고중량)*/ , BOXQTY /*TI(박스의수)*/ , BOXHEIGHT /*HI(박스의높이)*/ , IFYN /*인터페이스유무(인터페이스받은 데이터)*/ , BOLWIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , BOLLENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , BOLHEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , BOLWEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , BOLVOL /*BOL 부피*/ , IFUOM /*단위(인터페이스)*/ , IFCOST /*소비기한(인터페이스)*/ , IFICTYPE ) SELECT #{owkey} AS OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , TT.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , TT.ICNAME /*상품명*/ , TT.ICGRKEY /*상품그룹 : 대중소 최상위*/ , TT.ICGRTYPE /*상품그룹유형*/ , TT.ICUTKEY /*상품단위코드*/ , TT.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , TT.WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , TT.LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , TT.HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , TT.WEIGHT /*중량*/ , TT.VOLUME /*부피*/ , TT.SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부(신물류관리)*/ , TT.SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , TT.SHELFLIFECODETYPE /*유통 기한구분(유형)*/ , TT.UDF1 /*사용자정의필드1*/ , TT.UDF2 /*온도구분(물류그룹 1 : 상온 , 2: 냉장 , 3: 냉동 , 4 : 초저온)*/ , TT.INTF_TEMPERING , TT.UDF3 /*사용자정의필드3*/ , TT.UDF4 /*사용자정의필드4*/ , TT.UDF5 /*사용자정의필드5*/ , TT.SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼입력유형*/ , TT.ACKEY /*대표거래처코드*/ , TT.REGDATE /*반영일자*/ , TT.TAXYN /*과세구분(Y/0:과세,N/1:면세)*/ , TT.DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , TT.BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , TT.BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , TT.RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , TT.ORDSTOPDATE /*변경시작일*/ , TT.RELEASEDAYS /*출고기준일수*/ , TT.LO_NON_STOCK_TYPE /*물류무재고운영구분*/ , TT.DISPSHELFKEY /*집기코드대분류(상온)*/ , TT.ACCSTOCKTYPE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , TT.ACCSTOCKDATE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , TT.RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , TT.RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , TT.ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , TT.MINORDQTY /*발주배수하한*/ , TT.MAXORDQTY /*발주배수상한*/ , TT.BRANDCODE /*브랜드코드*/ , TT.SPEC /*규격*/ , TT.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ , #{closdate} AS CLOSDATE /*종료 일시*/ , TT.ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입(첫발주)일자*/ , TT.FOODYN /*식품여부(Y:식품,N:비식품)*/ , TT.CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , TT.STC_APPLY_GRADE_CD /*재고등급코드(OMS)*/ , TT.ACCEXDAY /*체화예정소진일수*/ , TT.OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , TT.INTF_OPERSTATYPE , TT.BOXYN /*공박스유무*/ , TT.BTLYN /*공병유무*/ , TT.BOXICKEY /*공박스상품코드*/ , TT.BTLICKEY /*공병상품코드*/ , TT.SHELFDAY /*유통기한*/ , TT.WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , TT.LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , TT.HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , TT.WEIGHTPI /*단품중량*/ , TT.VOLUMEPI /*단품부피*/ , TT.ORDQTY /*점포발주입수*/ , TT.STDCOSTPRICE /*표준원가*/ , TT.SCMCHECK /*SCM팀확인*/ , TT.SCMURKEY /*SCM팀확인자*/ , TT.STC_APPLY_GRADE_TYPE /*재고등급구분(OMS)*/ , TT.MDTEAL /*MD팀*/ , TT.MDNAME /*MD명*/ , TT.STC_APPLY_GRADE_NAME /*재고등급명(OMS)*/ , TT.IMGURL /*상품 이미지 URL*/ , TT.OPTKEY /**/ , TT.OPTNM /**/ , TT.QC_TYPE /**/ , TT.NOPACKAGE /**/ , TT.COUNTRYCD /**/ , TT.ACCEXDAY_FLAG /**/ , TT.UDF6 /**/ , TT.PLTQTY /*팔렛 입수 수량*/ , TT.BRANDKEY /**/ , TT.WGT_CF_YN /*검근여부*/ , TT.WGT_TYPE /*정산중량기준(A:상품중량, B:입고중량)*/ , TT.BOXQTY /*TI(박스의수)*/ , TT.BOXHEIGHT /*HI(박스의높이)*/ , TT.IFYN /*인터페이스유무(인터페이스받은 데이터)*/ , TT.BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , TT.BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , TT.BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , TT.BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , TT.BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ , TT.INTF_UOM /*단위(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_COST /*소비기한(인터페이스)*/ , TT.INTF_IC_TYPE FROM ( SELECT IIC.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IIC.ICNAME /*상품명*/ , CTG.ICGRPKEY /*상품그룹 : 대중소 최상위*/ , 'CATEGORY' AS ICGRTYPE /*상품그룹유형*/ , IIC.ICKEY AS ICUTKEY /*상품단위코드*/ , IIC.UOM /*단위(UOM)*/ , STND.BOXWIDTH AS WIDTH /*박스가로*/ , STND.BOXLENGTH AS LENGTH /*박스세로*/ , STND.BOXHEIGHT AS HEIGHT /*박스높이*/ , STND.BOXWEIGHT AS WEIGHT /*중량*/ , STND.BOXVOLUME AS VOLUME /*부피*/ , CASE WHEN COALESCE(IIC.COST, 0)=0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SHELFLIFEINDICATOR /*유통기한체크여부(신물류관리)*/ , IIC.COST AS SHELFLIFE /*입고기준일*/ , 'E' AS SHELFLIFECODETYPE /*유통 기한구분(유형)*/ , NULL AS UDF1 /*사용자정의필드1*/ , IIC.TEMPERING AS UDF2 /*온도구분(물류그룹 1 : 상온 , 2: 냉장 , 3: 냉동 , 4 : 초저온)*/ , IIC.INTF_TEMPERING , NULL AS UDF3 /*사용자정의필드3*/ , NULL AS UDF4 /*사용자정의필드4*/ , NULL AS UDF5 /*사용자정의필드5*/ , NULL AS SERIALINPUTTYPE /*시리얼입력유형*/ , NULL AS ACKEY /*대표거래처코드*/ , NULL AS REGDATE /*반영일자*/ , 'N' AS TAXYN /*과세구분(Y/0:과세,N/1:면세)*/ , 'N' AS DELYN /*삭제구분*/ , 0 AS BOXPRICE /*박스금액*/ , 0 AS BOTTLEPRICE /*병금액*/ , NULL AS RETURNOR /*점포반품구분*/ , NULL AS ORDSTOPDATE /*변경시작일*/ , 0 AS RELEASEDAYS /*출고기준일수*/ , NULL AS LO_NON_STOCK_TYPE /*물류무재고운영구분*/ , NULL AS DISPSHELFKEY /*집기코드대분류(상온)*/ , NULL AS ACCSTOCKTYPE /*체화재고운영구분*/ , NULL AS ACCSTOCKDATE /*체화재고운영일자*/ , NULL AS RFIDBOX /*RFID_박스*/ , NULL AS RFIDBOTTLE /*RFID_병*/ , IIC.IC_TYPE AS ICTYPE /*1일반상품, 2이벤트상품*/ , NULL AS MINORDQTY /*발주배수하한*/ , NULL AS MAXORDQTY /*발주배수상한*/ , NULL AS BRANDCODE /*브랜드코드*/ , IIC.SPEC /*규격*/ , IIC.CTGKEY /*소분류*/ , NULL AS ORDSTARTDATE /*상품도입(첫발주)일자*/ , 'Y' AS FOODYN /*식품여부(Y:식품,N:비식품)*/ , NULL AS CHITTYPE /*전표생성구분*/ , NULL AS STC_APPLY_GRADE_CD /*재고등급코드(OMS)*/ , 0 AS ACCEXDAY /*체화예정소진일수*/ , IIC.IC_STATUS AS OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , IIC.INTF_IC_STATUS AS INTF_OPERSTATYPE /*운영상태구분*/ , NULL AS BOXYN /*공박스유무*/ , NULL AS BTLYN /*공병유무*/ , NULL AS BOXICKEY /*공박스상품코드*/ , NULL AS BTLICKEY /*공병상품코드*/ , IIC.COST AS SHELFDAY /*유통기한*/ , STND.EAWIDTH AS WIDTHPI /*단품가로*/ , STND.EALENGTH AS LENGTHPI /*단품세로*/ , STND.EAHEIGHT AS HEIGHTPI /*단품높이*/ , STND.EAWEIGHT AS WEIGHTPI /*단품중량*/ , STND.EAVOLUME AS VOLUMEPI /*단품부피*/ , NULL AS ORDQTY /*점포발주입수*/ , NULL AS STDCOSTPRICE /*표준원가*/ , 'N' AS SCMCHECK /*SCM팀확인*/ , NULL AS SCMURKEY /*SCM팀확인자*/ , NULL AS STC_APPLY_GRADE_TYPE /*재고등급구분(OMS)*/ , NULL AS MDTEAL /*MD팀*/ , NULL AS MDNAME /*MD명*/ , NULL AS STC_APPLY_GRADE_NAME /*재고등급명(OMS)*/ , NULL AS IMGURL /*상품 이미지 URL*/ , NULL AS OPTKEY /**/ , NULL AS OPTNM /**/ , NULL AS QC_TYPE /**/ , 'N' AS NOPACKAGE /**/ , NULL AS COUNTRYCD /**/ , NULL AS ACCEXDAY_FLAG /**/ , NULL AS UDF6 /**/ , NULL AS PLTQTY /*팔렛 입수 수량*/ , NULL AS BRANDKEY /**/ , IIC.WGT_CF_YN /*검근여부*/ , 'A' AS WGT_TYPE /*정산중량기준(A:상품중량, B:입고중량)*/ , NULL AS BOXQTY /*TI(박스의수)*/ , NULL AS BOXHEIGHT /*HI(박스의높이)*/ , 'Y' AS IFYN /*인터페이스유무(인터페이스받은 데이터)*/ , STND.BOLWIDTH AS BOL_WIDTH /*BOL 가로*/ , STND.BOLLENGTH AS BOL_LENGTH /*BOL 세로*/ , STND.BOLHEIGHT AS BOL_HEIGHT /*BOL 높이*/ , STND.BOLWEIGHT AS BOL_WEIGHT /*BOL 중량*/ , STND.BOLVOLUME AS BOL_VOLUME /*BOL 부피*/ , IIC.INTF_UOM /*단위(인터페이스)*/ , IIC.INTF_COST /*소비기한(인터페이스)*/ , IIC.INTF_IC_TYPE , CASE WHEN MIC.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC IIC JOIN (
) STND ON IIC.ICKEY = STND.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CTG CTG ON IIC.CTGKEY = CTG.CTGKEY AND CTG.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC MIC ON IIC.ICKEY = MIC.ICKEY AND MIC.OWKEY = #{owkey} WHERE IIC.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND IIC.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml updateIcxct */ UPDATE TADMIN_MST_ICXCT UCT SET ( UCT.LOGGRPCD , UCT.ICGRPKEY , UCT.UPDATEDATE , UCT.UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT IC.UDF2 AS LOGGRPCD , IC.ICGRPKEY , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGRXCT CT ON IC.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND IC.ICGRPKEY = CT.ICGRPKEY AND CT.ICGRPTYPE = 'CATEGORY' WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND IC.ICKEY = UCT.ICKEY AND CT.CTKEY = UCT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = UCT.OWKEY ) WHERE UCT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC T1 JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON T1.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGRXCT CT ON IC.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND IC.ICGRPKEY = CT.ICGRPKEY AND CT.ICGRPTYPE = 'CATEGORY' WHERE T1.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T1.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND T1.ICKEY = UCT.ICKEY AND CT.CTKEY = UCT.CTKEY )
mapper.insert: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml insertIcxct */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_MST_ICXCT ( OWKEY , ICKEY , CTKEY , LOGGRPCD , VOLTYPE , NEWYN , ORDTYPE , ICGRPKEY , DCKEY , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT TT.OWKEY , TT.ICKEY , TT.CTKEY , TT.LOGGRPCD , '0' AS VOLTYPE , 'Y' AS NEWYN , '0' AS ORDTYPE , TT.ICGRKEY , '1' AS DCKEY , 'N' AS DELYN , #{interfaceDate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자*/ , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정일자*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자*/ FROM ( SELECT IC.OWKEY , IC.ICKEY , CT.CTKEY , IC.UDF2 AS LOGGRPCD , IC.ICGRPKEY , CASE WHEN A.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SAVEYN FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICGRXCT CT ON IC.OWKEY = CT.OWKEY AND IC.ICGRPKEY = CT.ICGRPKEY AND CT.ICGRPTYPE = 'CATEGORY' LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT A ON IC.ICKEY = A.ICKEY AND CT.CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = A.OWKEY WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TT WHERE TT.SAVEYN = 'Y'
mapper.select: /* adm-item-itemrest-sql-oracle.xml selectWcsSendTargetItems */ SELECT CT.OWKEY , I.ICKEY , CT.CTKEY , CASE WHEN I.IC_STATUS IN ('IN', '2') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS STOPYN /*단종*/ FROM TADMIN_INTF_IC I JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICXCT CT ON I.ICKEY = CT.ICKEY AND CT.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TWORK_SET_CTCS WCT ON CT.CTKEY = WCT.CTKEY AND CTCSKEY = 'AUTOWH_IF_YN' AND WCT.VALUE1 = 'YES' WHERE I.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND I.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt}
